theme: E1 finalize & polish (decadal-close prep): re-render the 4 section heroes on Imagen Ultra (deploy used Fast under 429), reconcile front_page_doctrine §1/§4 to the SHIPPED image-led/Tokyo-Night register, verify Mermaid/OG on-palette, and clear 2 pre-existing dark-mode AA contrast misses surfaced by the full gate run.
register: ss_ghibli_pixel / tokyo_night (#1a1b26/#24283b base, #9d7cd8 purple primary, #7dcfff cyan links, #e0a84c warm amber accent)
operator_scope: Operator (AskUserQuestion): close E1 now (defer Section-5 public-good tease to E5 + breadth-first nav to a later pass) + run the full 30-persona RLP via Workflow + ALL polish (section heroes on Ultra + front_page_doctrine §1/§4 edits + Mermaid/OG). Redeploy in scope (bundled at close).
target: what/design/front_page_doctrine.md (§1 image-led hero mode + §4 shipped-register note; status draft->active)
change_summary: POLISH: re-rendered the 4 section heroes (learn/how/patterns/reference) on Imagen 4 Ultra (8 candidates c148 + 3 'how' re-rolls c148b to dodge a faux-text module); winners learn=c148_v1, how=c148b_v2, patterns=c148_v2, reference=c148_v2 (all 1408x792, on-register, no baked title text); swapped over the live Fast heroes. Reconciled front_page_doctrine.md: §1 adds the shipped 'image-led manifesto' hero mode + an ADR-032 reconciliation note (image+title composed as one focal unit; supersedes the abstract-only guardrail), §4 adds a 'shipped register' note (Tokyo Night/SS-Ghibli realizes the ~55/45 dial without moving it); status draft->active (reconciled at this RLP decadal per the doc's own change discipline). Verified Mermaid theme + OG generator already on Tokyo Night palette + 'adna.network' (set at cycle 147) — no drift, no regen. A11y FIXES (2 pre-existing dark-mode misses the full gate run surfaced, not caught at the cycle-147 partial pass): (1) tutorial-meta.css used :global(.dark) in a PLAIN .css file — an invalid selector that gets dropped, so the light-mode green #147b3a (2.34:1) rendered in dark mode; changed to plain .dark (matches every other .css file) -> dark badge text #34C06E applies. (2) 404.astro 'Go home' .btn was white on --color-primary which flips to the lighter #9d7cd8 (3.32:1) in dark mode; mirrored the global .btn-primary fix with :global(.dark) .btn:not(.btn-outline){background:var(--brand-primary-dark)} (#6d4bb8, 5.8:1), scoped off the outline button.

doctrine_compliance.adr_032_register_pivot: honored — Ultra heroes are the same SS-Ghibli/Tokyo-Night register, higher fidelity; front_page_doctrine now records the image-led hero mode as legal
doctrine_compliance.purpose_over_decoration: retained — section heroes carry the per-section motif; no decorative motion added
doctrine_compliance.aa_contrast: IMPROVED — 0 WCAG-AA color-contrast violations in BOTH dark and light across the 5 sampled pages (axe); fixed 2 pre-existing dark-mode misses
doctrine_compliance.reduced_motion: honored — prefers-reduced-motion present in built CSS; no motion added
doctrine_compliance.no_baked_text: honored — winners carry no baked title text ('how' re-rolled to drop a faux-text module); diegetic UI/book-spine texture only
doctrine_compliance.above_fold_law: honored — image-led manifesto is one composed focal unit (title leads, scene grounds); ≤2 fighting colors

validation.astro_build: PASS — 161 pages, ~5s, 0 errors (new heroes re-optimized to WebP/AVIF)
validation.playwright_gates: PASS — 56/56 (the 2 a11y failures the first run surfaced were fixed; re-run green)
validation.a11y_axe: 0 WCAG-AA color-contrast violations BOTH modes across Home/Concept/Tutorial/Pattern/404 (dark via gate-4; light via standalone axe probe)

lighthouse.tool: lighthouse desktop preset, 5 representative pages, local preview
lighthouse.performance: 100 on all 5 (home/concept/tutorial/glossary/adopter) — hard gate MET; homepage 97->100 vs Phase-7 baseline
lighthouse.accessibility: mean 99 (home 96 = one mobile target-size spacing item; concept/tutorial/glossary/adopter 100)

validation.screenshots: 9 captured to site/evidence/e1_rlp_screens/ (home dark/light/mobile + 4 hubs + tutorial + registry) — feed the RLP
validation.reviewer_lens_pass: 30-persona RLP run as a Workflow (cycle 149 / decadal close)

image_gen.model: imagen-4.0-ultra-generate-001 (Ultra had capacity this session; 1 transient 429 retry resolved)

winners.how: candidates/sec_how_c148b_v2.png (clean modular pipeline, diegetic UI tiles, warm lamp)

deploy: bundled at decadal close (cycle 149) via vercel deploy --prebuilt; Vercel source-build fails because prebuild reaches ../scripts
notes: Cycle 8 of E1 (polish/finalize). Findings: (1) Imagen Ultra had capacity this session (cycle 147 had to fall back to Fast) — Ultra winners are visibly richer; the 'how' pipeline motif tends to bake faux-text module labels, cleared by a peopleless/iconographic re-roll. (2) ROOT-CAUSE a11y find: a PLAIN .css file using :global(.dark) silently drops the rule (it is an Astro scoped-style construct only) — this is why the cycle-147 'axe 0 both modes' claim missed the difficulty-badge; the lesson is to run the FULL gate suite (gate-4 samples Tutorial + 404, not just the homepage) at the decadal close, not just homepage axe. (3) --color-primary flips light->dark (deep #6d4bb8 -> light #9d7cd8); any white-on-primary button needs a .dark override to --brand-primary-dark. Cumulative v8 P5 image-gen ledger: $1.72 (through D14) + $0.24 (cycle 146 hero) + $0.14 (cycle 147 heroes) + $0.44 (this) = ~$2.54 of $50 (5.1%).
